summary: Rohit Bansal, a business owner, has a CIBIL score of 700, an annual income of INR 850,000 and assets worth INR 1,200,000, but his loan history shows minor delays, giving him an overall risk score of 68/100. He is classified as a Good Lead but the recommendation flags a manual review. The sales team should move forward with this lead after completing the required manual review.
